control_awareness: Aware that the amount triggers department head approval (P2P-C-001) and that approval must be obtained before PO issuance (P2P-C-003). Also aware that requester cannot self-approve (P2P-C-002).
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed to the department head for approval before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the quarter-end budget consumption pressure and the purchase amount exceeding the 1,000,000 threshold, creating a single purchase request for the full amount is the most efficient and compliant action. This meets the objectives of using the available budget before the period closes while respecting all system-enforced controls and allowed actions.
reason: The purchase amount is above the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval, so creating a single purchase request for the full amount is appropriate. This aligns with the need to use the remaining budget before quarter-end and avoids unnecessary splitting of requests.
